When our Health Insurance, Car Insurance, Life Insurance Claim is rejected, we have no idea what to do next.
We know that our Claim is valid but we don't know the way to get it approved.
Don't worry. In Today's Video We will Discuss a Step by Step Process which can get your rejected insurance claim approved.

There are Total Four steps which you have to Follow.

Insurance Claim Rejection is Just a Decision of Insurance Company and not the final verdict.


Let's watch Video to Know what are these four steps..

Imortant Links Below:

IRDAI Complaint Portal - https://bimabharosa.irdai.gov.in/

Insurance Ombudsmen Online Complaint - https://cioins.co.in/Complaint

Insurance Ombudsmen Office Details - https://drive.google.com/file/d/1wPSk5daGmsgcoteqCBipdzrBS4zt7mnR/view?usp=sharing

Let me clarify: my son's condition was serious. We had already visited the OPD twice. It was on the doctor's advice that he was admitted for proper care. The doctor has even provided a written justification for the admission. Still, the insurance company refuses to honor the claim.

So, does this mean next time I should first call CARE Health Insurance and ask for permission before admitting a seriously ill child? If something goes wrong in such a delay, will CARE take the responsibility?

This experience has left me feeling that insurance companies like CARE are nothing short of legal scammers—failing people in their time of need. Deeply disappointed and disillusioned.

Insurance companies are biggest scammers of our country....
